betterquesting:10.desc:8:
The Vibration Chamber generates AE power by burning solid fuels. It is the AE2-native power generator.

Fuel efficiency:
Coal/Charcoal: 2 AE/t for 5 minutes
Coal Block: 18 AE/t for 5 minutes
Lava Bucket: 200 AE/t for 50 seconds

The Vibration Chamber has an internal buffer of 200 AE. It outputs power to the cable network automatically.

Tip: Use charcoal from a tree farm for sustainable early-game AE power. Upgrade to external RF/FE power as soon as possible.
